import cadquery as cq
w0=cq.Workplane('XY',origin=(0,0,59))
w1=cq.Workplane('XY',origin=(0,0,100))
r=w0.workplane(offset=-2/2).moveTo(0,0.5).box(1.5,1,1.5).union(w1.sketch().push([(0,-0)]).circle(60.5).circle(53,mode='s').finalize().extrude(-200)).union(w1.workplane(offset=-10/2).box(1.5,1.5,6.5))
